title: Creative Brief + Director Notes (Phase B / nodes 5+6, one call)
description: Contract for analysis/director_notes.json. Nodes 5 (Creative Brief — qualitative direction) and 6 (Director Notes — how to use the engine) are one continuous chain, so they are produced in a SINGLE DeepSeek call and stored together. director_notes is the guardrailed half (Phụ lục A): every effect/transition/curves/easing/overlay value the model returns is clamped to the engine whitelists loaded from timeline.schema.json — unknown values are replaced with safe defaults, and the model may set no file paths, quality presets, durations, or coordinates.

choice.description: Which story option this brief realises.

creative_brief.description: Node 5 — qualitative direction. Free text/enum only; drives no math.

director_notes.description: Node 6 — engine-language decisions. Every *Effect/*Transition value is one of the engine enums (see timeline.schema.json $defs/effect and $defs/transitionType); the runtime guardrail is what enforces this, so these are typed as strings here.

openingEffect.description: Effect enum for the opening slide (e.g. slow_zoom_in).

defaultTransition.description: Transition enum used between most slides (e.g. crossfade).

endingTransition.description: Transition enum into the final slide (e.g. fade_slow).

montageEffect.description: Which film-roll effect montage sequences use.

heroEffect.description: Effect enum for hero / full-bleed photos (e.g. dark_feather).

groupEffect.description: Effect enum for group photos (e.g. collage_grid, memory_wall).

colorCurves.description: curvesPreset enum or null for none.

notes.description: Free director commentary (advisory; not executed directly).

asset_choices.description: Optional asset ids chosen from analysis/assets_catalog.ai.json. Runtime guardrails drop ids not present in the catalog; timeline generation maps valid ids to local paths from assets_catalog.full.json.
